form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (21.00) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 2 lengths. Has two minors from three starts from box 1. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (21.00) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 2 lengths. Has two minors from three starts from box 1. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a scorching early sectional but swamped late when a close up fifth (30.16) at this track over 520m. Major threat on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a scorching early sectional but swamped late when a close up fifth (30.16) at this track over 520m. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing second (29.63) at Wentworth Park. Drawn close to the inside. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing second (29.63) at Wentworth Park. Drawn close to the inside. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Temora to win by 0.8 lengths in 18.94, beating Let's Go Out. Last start finished 7th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 9 lengths (30.41) behind Late In Winter in a Grade 5 on April 5. Likely to find this too tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at Temora to win by 0.8 lengths in 18.94, beating Let's Go Out. Last start finished 7th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 9 lengths (30.41) behind Late In Winter in a Grade 5 on April 5. Likely to find this too tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the home turn came together.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 365m at this track. Hard to recommend this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 365m at this track. Hard to recommend this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the first turn and lost ground.
Passing the first turn checked off the heels, losing momentum.

form.formComment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but he goes well over this track and distance with two wins from three starts. Leading chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but he goes well over this track and distance with two wins from three starts. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 0.8 lengths second over 300m Taree Super Track in 17.40. Although unsuccessful last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with her.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a 0.8 lengths second over 300m Taree Super Track in 17.40. Although unsuccessful last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with her.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing last on April 7 over 400m at Bulli in a Grade 5. This will test.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing last on April 7 over 400m at Bulli in a Grade 5. This will test.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was galloped on rounding the home turn and lost ground as a consequence.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when fifth (30.06) at Richmond at last run and returns here after a three-and-a-half months break. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Suited here and sure to go close fresh.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 520m at this track beaten 5 lengths (30.22) behind Princess Ada in a Grade 5 on April 9. Has clocked an outstanding 29.71 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.
